'''鈭歸-w-h-ng''' ('''kawawhengoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:tinfoil|tinfoil]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-w-h-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tinfoil|tinfoil]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歸-w-h-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kawawhengoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwawhengoko|thiwawhengoko]] || [[word:jiwawhengoko|jiwawhengoko]] || [[word:shiwawhengoko|shiwawhengoko]] || [[word:kiwawhengoko|kiwawhengoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
